response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 14+ years of experience, the role requires specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and deep-learning workload optimization that is entirely absent from the resume. His background is almost exclusively in web services, mobile development, and DevOps infrastructure—a different domain requiring minimal new learning for the candidate and maximum ramp-up time for the team at a Principal level where immediate impact is expected.
strengths: Deep systems programming background with C, C++, and D for performance-critical applications
Demonstrated ability to optimize for latency and throughput (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
14+ years of software craftsmanship with architectural thinking across diverse technology stacks
concerns: No documented experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware design—core responsibility of the role
Absence of GPU architecture, AI accelerator, or deep-learning workload optimization background—the primary focus area
Career trajectory centered on web services and applications, with no transition toward hardware-software co-design or low-level performance modeling

key_factors.factor: Systems programming capability and performance optimization mindset
